4.aText: every Monday through Friday at 9:30 a.m.

5.bText: every day at 9 a.m. and 5 p.m.

6.aText: Every hour, between 09:00 AM and 05:00 PM
6.bText: every hour from 9 a.m. through 5 p.m.

7.aText: every minute from zero through 29 past the hour

8.aText: At 12:00 AM, on day 1 and 15 of the month

9.bText: At 12:00 PM, on day 1 of the month, only in January

11.aText: every hour from 10 p.m. through 2 a.m.
11.bText: Every hour, between 10:00 PM and 02:00 AM

12.aText: on the last Friday of the month at midnight
12.bText: At 12:00 AM, on the last Friday of the month

14.aText: every 15 minutes from 9 a.m. through 5:45 p.m. on Monday through Friday
14.bText: Every 15 minutes, between 09:00 AM and 05:59 PM, Monday through Friday

15.aText: At 09:00 AM, 12:00 PM and 05:00 PM, Monday through Friday
15.bText: every Monday through Friday at 9 a.m., noon, and 5 p.m.

16.bText: At 12:00 AM, on day 29 of the month, only in February

17.aText: at five and ten seconds past the minute, every Monday at 9:30 a.m.
17.bText: At 5 and 10 seconds past the minute, at 30 minutes past the hour, at 09:00 AM, only on Monday

18.aText: At 12:00 AM, only on Monday through Friday and Sunday
18.bText: every Sunday and Monday through Friday at midnight

19.aText: Every hour, at 09:00 AM through 08:00 PM and 10:00 PM
19.bText: every day at 9 a.m. through 8 p.m. and 10 p.m.

20.aText: on December 31 or on Friday in December at 11:59 p.m.
20.bText: At 11:59 PM, on day 31 of the month, and on Friday, only in December

21.aText: At 09:30 AM, on the weekday nearest day 15 of the month, only in June
21.bText: on the weekday nearest the 15th in June at 9:30 a.m.

22.aText: Every 1 minutes, starting at 1 minutes past the hour
22.bText: every minute from one through 59 past the hour
